texto: The ultimate authority of my life is not the Bible
autor: it is not confined between the covers of a book. It is not something written by men and frozen in time. It is not from a source outside myself. My ultimate authority is the divine voice in my own soul. Period.
explicacao: Citação de it is not confined between the covers of a book. It is not something written by men and frozen in time. It is not from a source outside myself. My ultimate authority is the divine voice in my own soul. Period. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The ultimate authority of my life is not the Bible” articula reflexao, sue-monk-kidd, the-dance-of-the-dissident-daughter em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-dance-of-the-dissident-daughter.
